title: Commando
subTitle: A disavowed commando escapes captivity after a year of torture at the hands of the chinese. On his way back to India, he is roped into protecting a woman from a local goon that wants to marry her.

title: Meri Biwi Ka Jawab Nahin
subTitle: Durga, a village girl and the wife of Inspector Ajay, fights against the injustices that women are subjected to. She fights for the truth and encounters many obstacles in the process.

title: Tan- Badan
subTitle: A spoilt young man wants to marry the girl of his dreams, but instead he has to marry an innocent village girl who knows nothing of the intimate relationship between a husband and wife.

title: Aan Milo Sajna
subTitle: Savitri, a wealthy widow, refuses to leave any inheritance to Anil, her self-centred son. So, he hires a woman to pretend to be his wife in order to please his mother.

title: Patthar Ke Sanam
subTitle: Meena and Taruna tease their new manager Rajesh, but both fall for him. An attack on Rajesh brings his mother to town, which reveals a dark past and leads to tragedy.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Seeta Aur Geeta
subTitle: Identical twins who were separated at birth, lead different lives, wherein one is abused by her aunt, the other turns out to be street smart. However, things take a turn when they reconnect and decide to swap places.

title: Maqsad
subTitle: Rajeshwar is the only son of a wealthy industrialist, while Tilak hails from a poor family. When Rajeshwar's father is murdered and the blame falls on Tilak, he must strive to prove his innocence.

title: Shaan
subTitle: After their cop brother dies at the hands of a ruthless gangster, Vijay and Ravi are determined to find the gangster and take their revenge.

title: Shaan
subTitle: After their cop brother dies at the hands of a ruthless gangster, Vijay and Ravi are determined to find the gangster and take their revenge.

title: Insaan Jaag Utha
subTitle: A village girl falls in love with newcomer Ranjeet, unaware that he is there to retrieve the smuggled gold he had buried in her front yard years ago.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Discover the behind-the-scenes world of popular films, with the cast and crew revealing their unique experiences and interesting stories from the set.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Ranbir Kapoor, Bobby Deol and Anil Kapoor discuss the creative process involved in developing the plot and cinematic elements of the movie 'Animal'.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Discover the behind-the-scenes world of popular films, with the cast and crew revealing their unique experiences and interesting stories from the set.

title: Nishchaiy
subTitle: When Ravi is falsely accused of a crime and sentenced to jail, his boss's wife, Renuka, promises to take care of his younger brother. However, Ravi is unable to find his brother after he is released.

title: Aatish Feel the Fire
subTitle: To support his younger brother, Avinash, Baba joins the world of crime. However, their worlds turn upside down when Avinash becomes a police officer and is ordered to arrest Baba.

title: Gardish
subTitle: Purshottam, a policeman, wishes for his son, Shiva, to become a police inspector. However, when he gets attacked by mobsters, the latter resorts to violence and crime.

title: Anari
subTitle: Rama, a simpleton, is appointed as the bodyguard of Rajnandini, a rich girl. She soon falls in love with him but her brothers' violent nature gets in the way of her uniting with Rama.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
subTitle: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

title: Junoon
subTitle: Vikram is badly injured and his friend is killed by a cursed tiger. He soon learns that the curse has been passed onto him and he will turn into a tiger on a full moon night.

title: Kshatriya
subTitle: Two royal families in Rajasthan fight annually to fulfil an age-old tradition. Unaware of the clash, their grandsons become best friends and attempt to end the family feud.

title: Kshatriya
subTitle: Two royal families in Rajasthan fight annually to fulfil an age-old tradition. Unaware of the clash, their grandsons become best friends and attempt to end the family feud.

title: ABHIMANYU
subTitle: Arjun seeks to change the education system by putting his life at risk to nationalise private schools in the country. Will he succeed in his efforts?
